description.value:
Adeptus Arbites

The Adeptus Arbites are the enforcers of Imperial law, the judges and executioners who maintain order across the Imperium's vast domain. Operating from fortified precinct-fortresses, the Arbites are trained in investigation, interrogation, and the application of lethal force. They answer not to local planetary governors but to the Lex Imperialis itself. An Arbites background produces individuals who are tough, disciplined, and uncompromising in their pursuit of justice.

Background Aptitudes

Offence, Defence

Starting Skills

Awareness, Common Lore (Adeptus Arbites), Intimidate or Scrutiny

Starting Talent

Weapon Training (Shock) or Weapon Training (Solid Projectile)

Background Bonus

The Face of the Law: An Arbites character counts as having the Peer (Adeptus Arbites) Talent. Additionally, they may re-roll any failed Intimidate Test against criminals or lawbreakers, taking the better result.

specialAbilities.name: The Face of the Law
specialAbilities.description: An Arbites character counts as having the Peer (Adeptus Arbites) Talent. Additionally, they may re-roll any failed Intimidate Test against criminals or lawbreakers, taking the better result.
